---
name: Improvement / feature request
about: Suggest a new agent, MCP, phase improvement, or new example
title: '[IMPROVEMENT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What are you proposing?**
A clear description of the addition or improvement.

**Which phase does this belong in?**
e.g. Phase 8 (new agent), Phase 9 (new MCP), Phase 0 (new intake question)

**Why is this valuable?**
What project type or scenario does this help with?

**Have you used this on a real project?**
- [ ] Yes — tested and working
- [ ] No — theoretical suggestion

**Draft content (optional)**
If you have a draft of the checklist, config, or text, paste it here.
